Play
Wiki / Controls & notation

Controls & number notation

Keyboard shortcuts for quick play, and the number-format options that control how those huge late-game figures are displayed.

Keyboard

Shortcuts

KeyAction
Space / EscPause & resume
Ctrl + SSave now

On touch devices, everything works by tapping — tap the blender to blend, just like clicking on desktop. There's also an Auto-Blend toggle if you'd rather not click.

Display

Number formats

Pick how large numbers are written in Settings → Accessibility.

FormatLooks like
Compact1.23K, 4.5M, 6.7B…
Compact (custom)1.23k, 4.5m, 6.7b… (lowercase)
Worded1.23 Million, 4.5 Billion (short scale)
Worded (European)Milliard, Billiard… (long scale)
Full digits1,234,567

The Help panel in-game includes a notation reference that updates to match whichever format you've chosen.

Settings & savesAll options GlossaryKey terms
